2002.issue: [W2002] Version of [package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.volvo/blob/master/package.json) (3.0.1) doesn't match latest version on [NPM](https://www.npmjs.com/package/iobroker.volvo) (3.0.0)

2004.issue: [E2004] Version "3.0.1" listed at common.news at [io-package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.volvo/blob/master/io-package.json) does not exist at [NPM](https://www.npmjs.com/package/iobroker.volvo). Please remove from news section.

2008.issue: [S2008] Version 3.0.0 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3032.issue: [W3032] Release 3.0.1 from [io-package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.volvo/blob/master/io-package.json)/package.json has not yet been tagged. Tagging releases is required.

5004.issue: [S5004] Plain setInterval() found in source files (main.js). Please use this.setInterval() or adapter.setInterval() instead.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (main.js). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

6033.issue: [E6033] `## License` section in [README.md](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.volvo/blob/master/README.md) must contain a copyright line like "Copyright (c) 2026 iobroker-community-adapters".

0077.issue: [E0077] "eslint.config.mjs" should use installed "@iobroker/eslint-config" via `import config from '@iobroker/eslint-config';`.

0085.issue: [S0085] No devDependency "@tsconfig/nodeXX" found. Consider adding one for proper type checking (see ioBroker.examples for examples).

0088.issue: [S0088] "/tsconfig.json" should contain an extends clause like "extends": "@tsconfig/node20/tsconfig.json" (see ioBroker.examples).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.8.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.volvo/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
